name: Boss threatening my job if I file hearing loss claim—retaliation legal?

mainEntity.name: Boss threatening my job if I file hearing loss claim—retaliation legal?

acceptedAnswer.description: No, illegal retaliation; protected to file legit claims.[5] Document threats, proceed anyway.[4] Key factors: Utah/Idaho anti-retaliation laws, prove timing links threat to claim.[5] Report to Labor Dept, keep job search records if fired.[5] Lawyer protects rights.[5]
